craigslist.title: Laundry Facilities, Patio/Balcony, Swimming Pool
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 6810 Lantern Hill Dr, Lochearn, MD 21207 At The Hills at Milford Mill, the convenience of city life meets the comfort of the suburbs. Our peaceful, pet-friendly community offers 1, 2, and 3-bedroom apartments and 3-bedroom townhomes. We are close to a large shopping center with groceries, restaurants, and entertainment; and since we’re situated next to Interstate 695, your commute to work in Baltimore City and the surrounding areas will be a breeze. From work to play, we’re confident our community will suit your needs. Apartment Features: Patio/Balcony* Renovated/Updated Interiors* Cable Ready* Spacious, Walk-in Closets Separate Den or Home Office Laundry in Unit* Individual Climate Control Community Features: Spacious Floor Plans Key Controlled Buildings On-Site Parking Swimming Pool Laundry Facilities Resident Portal with Online Payments Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://signaturepropsliving.com/2puztfeb/hills-at-milford-mill Pricing and availability are subject to change.

craigslist.title: Electronic Thermostat, On-Site Maintenance, Gas Range
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 1 Giard Dr, Woodlawn, MD 21244 Located in Baltimore County on the Northeast side of Downtown Baltimore in Windsor Mill, MD, you will find Queens Ridge Apartments! Our 2-bedroom apartments are designed to meet your everyday needs. Enjoy the comforts of spacious closets, individual A/C and heating, on-site parking, and a private patio or balcony. Located conveniently near transportation, shopping, and awesome entertainment, you'll find your home at Queens Ridge Apartments! Apartment Features: Air Conditioner Electronic Thermostat Large Closets Washer/Dryer In 2 Bedroom 2 Bath Units Microwave in Select Units Patio/Balcony Carpeting Gas Range Dishwasher Disposal Cable Ready Community Features: Short Term Leases Available (6 and 9 months) Laundry Facilities On-Site Parking On-Site Management On-Site Maintenance New Fitness Center Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://signaturepropsliving.com/ffumuvj3/queens Pricing and availability are subject to change.
